mapper.insert: insert into incident_occurrence_summary(summary_id,incident_id,fingerprint,tenant_id,source_system,site_id,plant_id,object_type,object_id,event_type,error_code,window_start,window_end,occurrence_count,max_severity,latest_event_id,latest_message,latest_payload_json) values(#{summary.summaryId},#{summary.incidentId},#{summary.fingerprint},#{summary.tenantId},#{summary.sourceSystem},#{summary.siteId},#{summary.plantId},#{summary.objectType},#{summary.objectId},#{summary.eventType},#{summary.errorCode},#{summary.windowStart},#{summary.windowEnd},1,#{summary.maxSeverity},#{summary.latestEventId},#{summary.latestMessage},coalesce(cast(#{summary.latestPayloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb)) on conflict(incident_id,window_start,window_end) do update set occurrence_count=incident_occurrence_summary.occurrence_count+1,max_severity=case when severity_rank(excluded.max_severity)>severity_rank(incident_occurrence_summary.max_severity) then excluded.max_severity else incident_occurrence_summary.max_severity end,latest_event_id=excluded.latest_event_id,latest_message=excluded.latest_message,latest_payload_json=excluded.latest_payload_json,updated_at=now()
mapper.select: select summary_id,incident_id,fingerprint,tenant_id,source_system,site_id,plant_id,object_type,object_id,event_type,error_code,window_start,window_end,occurrence_count,max_severity,latest_event_id,latest_message,latest_payload_json from incident_occurrence_summary where incident_id=#{incidentId} order by window_start desc limit #{limit}
